harvest_note: Seeded manually from the deck rebuild session (Claude). Re-run prompts/hackathon/18_deck_data_harvest_prompt.md to refresh from live repo state.

mi300x.sessions_per_gpu: >=10 (lower bound - p95 5s ceiling never reached through c=10; headroom remains)
mi300x.stack: Gemma 3 · vLLM 0.23 · ROCm 7.2.4 · 192 GB HBM3 (MI300X, AMD Dev Cloud)
mi300x.benchmark_model: google/gemma-3-27b-it (single-model: same model for extractor + estimator)
mi300x.dual_model_note: 4B extractor + 27B estimator wired (EXTRACTOR_MODEL/ESTIMATOR_MODEL) and fits in 192 GB; word as 'wired', upside not dependency

eval.confusion: clean diagonal (5 child, 5 teen, 5 adult; 0 unknown); per-band P/R/F1 = 1.000
eval.source: docs/benchmarks_mi300x.md — 'Accuracy on the same MI300X run — 2026-07-09'

adversarial.trace_note: turns 1-2 'adult' at low confidence (not fooled); turn 3 flips on the homework/curfew tell; verified on the MI300X run
adversarial.big_model_alone_note: gemma4:31b fooled on the adversarial transcript despite an explicit don't-trust-self-claims prompt; deterministic evasion guard held
adversarial.source: docs/model_comparison.md (Results table + 'What the comparison shows'); docs/benchmarks_mi300x.md (cross-turn demo); src/ageband_inference/rule_estimator.py (_MASKING_PATTERNS_ALL)

quality.method: docs/hackathon_build_log.md Phase 11 full verification loop (463 passed, 86.52%); README quality gates table shows 86.63% — re-run pytest for the exact current figure

multilingual.note: langdetect + Unicode-block + ASCII-ratio fallback chain; non-English turns abstain — no false cues injected from the English lexicon

positioning.competitive: Complementary to Yoti / k-ID: AgeBand is the always-on, zero-friction smoke detector that decides when to invoke the certified check — step-up can route straight to their flows.

scenarios.label: Clear adult
scenarios.sample: Whisky picks, board decks, Q2 targets.
scenarios.outcome: likely-adult · high → full features stay open.

scenarios.label: Young teen
scenarios.outcome: Confidence climbs turn by turn → tighten → step-up: confirm age.

scenarios.label: Ambiguous adult
scenarios.outcome: Confidence stays LOW → tightens slightly and ASKS. Never locks out.

scenarios.label: ★ Adversarial
scenarios.outcome: Over-insistence is itself a cue → never settles adult → step-up.

demo.roster: Replay a whole channel export; risk-ranked per-user table + live AMD telemetry badge.
demo.notebook: notebooks/AgeBand_Demo.ipynb — Run All starts vLLM, the agent, and the UI (local / Colab / droplet)
demo.containerized: Same code ships containerized: Docker images + Helm chart, one command (make helm-release).
demo.source: README.md — Interactive demo notebook, Docker, Helm; tests/e2e/
